title: Totem Of Walter
description: A totem of undying of Walter White from Breaking Bad.
body:
# Waltuh

This is a resource pack that modifies the totem of undying so it's now Walter White.

![Totem preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3161ff18cef07b8b25ea113b0a6c4305358add26_0.webp)
